title: Image Generation Asset
description: Shared internal asset contract for the image generation step. Produced by the 06b_generate_images workflow after normalizing the provider-specific API response. Used by downstream media pipeline steps and committed to GitHub as images.json.

images.description: Generated image records. Each entry corresponds to one image returned by the provider.

index.description: Zero-based position in the generated image array.

prompt.description: The prompt submitted to the provider for this image.

revised_prompt.description: Revised prompt returned by the provider (OpenAI DALL-E rewrites prompts for safety). Null when not provided.

provider.description: The provider that generated this image.

model.description: The model identifier used to generate this image.

size.description: Image dimensions (e.g. '1024x1024'). Null when not tracked.

format.description: Format of the returned image data. OpenAI returns 'url' (temporary); Google returns 'b64_json'.

url.description: Temporary image URL returned by OpenAI. Valid for approximately 1 hour after generation. Null for Google.

b64_json.description: Base64-encoded PNG/JPEG image data returned by Google Imagen. Null for OpenAI.

mime_type.description: MIME type of the image (e.g. 'image/png'). Populated for Google b64_json responses. Null for OpenAI URL responses.

generated_at.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when the image was generated.

image_count.description: Number of images generated. Must equal images.length.

provider.description: The provider that fulfilled the image generation request.

model.description: The model identifier used for the generation request.

generated_at.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when the batch was generated.

images.prompt: Professional finance news thumbnail, rising candlestick charts with golden upward trend, global financial data streams, clean modern aesthetic, deep blue and gold color palette, photorealistic style, no text
images.revised_prompt: A professional finance news thumbnail featuring rising golden candlestick charts against a dark blue background with streams of financial data flowing across the scene. Modern, clean, photorealistic style without any text overlays.

images.prompt: Cryptocurrency market visualization, Bitcoin and Ethereum symbols glowing in a blockchain network, digital currency flows, dark background with neon blue accents, cinematic lighting, no text
